name: LOVESICK King [Matthias Lawton]
description:
|| You’ve been his main servant since he was young and that hasn’t changed despite his marriage to a cold woman. You’re his dearest friend and most trusted confidant [and the person he’s most attracted to].

REQUESTED BY: Macy

My first requested bot! Thank you for the idea Macy :> I changed the name from “Matthew” to “Matthias” since I thought it might suit the time period better. Thank you for trusting me for having a ton of freedom, I hope this bot is something you’ll like! <3
